name: Delegance Limousine Svc
recent_news: No public M&A, news, or website found. Listed as small Lubbock limousine service; flagged special_needs=1 in source data but no evidence of school-bus contracting.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Sub-scale (~6 employees, ~$339K revenue), limo/possible NEMT operator, not a school-bus contractor. Out of scope for Summit tuck-in.

name: E K Ad LLC Transportation
recent_news: No public web presence, website, or news found. Garland ISD operates its own transportation in-house; no evidence E K Ad is a district contractor.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Micro-operator (4 employees, ~$335K revenue), no school-bus footprint identified. Out of scope for Summit tuck-in.

name: Satterwhite Ossian
recent_news: DBA Priority Care Wheelchair Transit Central Division; sole proprietorship. May 2021 contract-debt lawsuit filed by Arthur Lee Willis Jr LLC vs. Ossian Satterwhite in Dallas County.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Wheelchair/NEMT sole proprietorship, not a school-bus contractor; sub-scale and outside Summit's yellow-bus mandate.

name: Anywhere Transportation Svc
recent_news: No website or news found for Augusta, KS entity at this address. Multiple unrelated 'Anywhere Transportation' LLCs exist (Olathe KS freight carrier, auto transport, etc.) — none confirmed school-bus.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Micro-operator (~6 employees, ~$334K revenue); Augusta USD 402 runs district transport; no evidence of school-bus contracting. Out of scope.

name: Joedread Enterprises LLC
recent_news: Operates as 'Joe Dread Enterprises Transportation' offering pickup/drop-off, personal vehicle take-home, and small-group transport; $75 minimum charge. No school-bus contracts or M&A news found.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Sub-scale (~6 employees, ~$334K revenue) Shreveport ground-transport/shuttle operator, not a yellow-bus contractor. Caddo Parish schools run transport in-house. Out of scope for Summit tuck-in.
